commit.message:
Implement Phase 3: canonical string with exhaustive backtracking

The greedy GraphToString is not isomorphism-equivariant because Python
set iteration order depends on node IDs. The canonical string computation
uses backtracking search over all valid neighbor choices at V/v branch
points (with in-place mutation and undo for performance) to produce a
true complete graph invariant.

- canonical.py: exhaustive search with _step/_walk/_undo helpers
- 18 unit tests: Levenshtein, basics, invariance, discrimination, distance
- 24 integration tests: random trees, cycles, complete graphs, Petersen
- All 246 tests pass, 90% coverage, ruff clean, mypy strict clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add CTM migration comparison tool + optimize migration script

- callrail_migration_script.py: parallel tracker fetching via
  ThreadPoolExecutor, shared requests.Session with retry/backoff,
  configurable webhook URL and --max-workers flag, timestamped logs

- ctm_migration_comparison.py (new): generates a self-contained
  side-by-side HTML report mapping each CallRail company config to
  its CTM equivalent. Pulls users, tags, notifications, full tracker
  detail (schedule, call flow steps, SMS settings, keywords, voicemail
  transcription, auto-tags). Collapsible tracker rows with Open/Close
  All, migration readiness score, per-company checklist and warnings.
  No OpenAI key required.

commit.message:
Fix: 位置情報関連機能を修正・統合

## 修正内容
- 周辺施設検索（/places）を位置情報コンテキストに統合
- ペット同伴飲食店（/restaurants）を位置情報コンテキストに統合
- かかりつけ病院（/vet）を位置情報コンテキストに統合

## 新機能
- 検索範囲選択（1km / 3km / 5km / 10km）
- 検索結果なし時の範囲拡張ボタン
- モック施設データによる即座の検索結果表示
- Googleマップ連携（現在地→施設の経路表示）
- 電話発信機能

## 処理フロー
1. 位置情報使用許可を確認
2. GPS/IP/キャッシュから現在地取得
3. 初期範囲（1-3km）で施設検索
4. 結果なしの場合は範囲拡張オプション表示
5. 施設選択→詳細表示→地図/電話

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Close the loop: detect and self-heal stale briefing dates

The system had no way to detect when featured.json was from a different
day than today. This caused yesterday's match previews to show as
"tonight" when the pipeline ran in data-only mode overnight.

Changes:
- pipeline-health.js: New "featured_date_mismatch" health check
  compares featured.json generatedAt date vs today — surfaces as
  warning in health-report.json for autopilot to act on
- run-pipeline.js: Date coherence check in checkDataUnchanged() sets
  featuredDayStale flag. generate-featured and post-generate are exempt
  from data-only skip when the briefing is from a different day, forcing
  regeneration on day boundaries even during non-peak hours
- Tests: 5 new tests covering both detection mechanisms

Now the system detects this class of problem autonomously (health check)
AND self-heals it (forced regeneration in data-only mode).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Bump build number to 158

- 98 LCC deferrals (was 9), 512 utility s56 recommendations (was 11)

commit.message:
refactor(cli): remove full-screen layout, use simple console output (#754) (#757)

* refactor(cli): remove full-screen layout, use simple console output (#754)

Removes the prompt_toolkit full-screen Application from the CLI REPL,
replacing it with simple Rich console.print() output and PromptSession
prompt_async() input. This fixes mouse capture stealing text selection,
laggy scroll wheel, and simplifies the codebase by ~4000 lines.

- Strip layout.py to essentials (InputLexer, input_line_prefix, set_approval_mode)
- Remove fullscreen globals, FullscreenLogHandler, streaming cursor from renderer.py
- Replace _run_fullscreen/_collect_input with simple asyncio input loop in repl.py
- Remove all is_fullscreen() dialog branches, keep non-fullscreen paths
- Update tests to remove fullscreen-dependent test classes and mocks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update documentation for current changes (#754)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): replace sync input() with async and refine CLI logo (#754)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): fix prompt_async message arg and restore triangle logo (#754)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): fix logo Rich markup escaping and ctrl+c exit (#754)

Use Text objects instead of f-string markup for logo backslashes.
Check _exit_flag after prompt_async returns so double Ctrl+C exits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): add patch_stdout for concurrent output and use existing prompt (#754)

Wrap concurrent input/agent tasks with patch_stdout to prevent terminal
corruption when agent streams output while prompt is active. Use the
existing _prompt() function instead of custom _prompt_message().

- Add `conversation_name` parameter to `format_status_toolbar()`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): fix toolbar flicker and slug rename not updating footer (#754)

- Replace message-count-based cache invalidation with explicit dirty
  flag to prevent toolbar recomputation during streaming
- Invalidate toolbar once before each prompt render for stable display
- Invalidate toolbar after /slug rename so new name appears immediately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add blank line after user prompt echo before RAG/Thinking status
- Add bottom padding to response markdown block before stats footer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rich consoles now write through the patch_stdout proxy so
prompt_toolkit can manage cursor positioning correctly. Raw ANSI
writes (spinners, tickers) still go to a real stderr fd. Removes
full_screen=True from picker app and updates tests.

Remove unused _toolbar_msg_count tracking and dead try/except
NameError around conv parameter in _toolbar_refresh().

* fix(cli): address code review findings (#754)

- Add throttled git branch refresh (10s) on toolbar invalidation
- Add _timed_input helper with 5-min timeout for interactive sub-prompts
- Replace all asyncio.to_thread(input) calls with _timed_input

* fix(cli): fix timeout test for python 3.10 compatibility (#754)

Mock asyncio.wait_for instead of asyncio.to_thread to avoid
subprocess transport cleanup race on Python 3.10.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): wrap asyncio.TimeoutError for python 3.10 compat (#754)

On Python 3.10, asyncio.TimeoutError is not a subclass of
builtins.TimeoutError. Catch asyncio.TimeoutError in _timed_input
and re-raise as builtins.TimeoutError for consistent handling.

commit.message:
v0.1.1: Wakeup broadcast on disconnect instead of process restart

The wallbox stops sending UDP broadcasts after authentication. When no
datagram is received for 35 seconds, instead of restarting the process,
the WiFiManager now:
- Resets connection and device state (initialization_state, logged_in)
- Sends a discovery broadcast (login beacon with all-FF serial/password)
  to 255.255.255.255 on the wallbox's last known source port
- Keeps the UDP socket open and reschedules the check every 35 seconds

This triggers the wallbox to resume broadcasting without requiring a
full addon restart or manual app intervention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

zylos init writes ZYLOS_WEB_PASSWORD but server.js only read
WEB_CONSOLE_PASSWORD, causing auth to silently fail on new installs.

- server.js: read ZYLOS_WEB_PASSWORD first, fall back to WEB_CONSOLE_PASSWORD
- SKILL.md: update docs to reference ZYLOS_WEB_PASSWORD
- .env.example: update template variable name
